newTests.name: asserts valid partial settings after applying defaults and reports combined errors
reset cancels pending work and rebasing without a replacement keeps it
normalizes deleted aliases and non-record indexing responses
validates whitespace, boundary length and slug characters
rejects category containers, items and ids with unsupported shapes
logs empty content and preserves unusual but valid runtime metadata
normalizes missing description, content and headline fields in FTS rows
exposes the exact supported preset values and metadata
stops fetching later batches after going offline during a drain

sends the exact REST fallback chain payload, including sanitized query and tag

omits optional tags, resources and falsy resource metadata

inserts exact note data when lookup returns a row without an id

continues after cleanup and onSuccess failures once sync itself succeeds

sends status and upsert requests with their respective payloads
applies tag and comma-safe search filters and advances a full page

makes an empty flush and a repeated flush no-ops

creates, updates and deletes notes and propagates errors

returns a non-full page without a next cursor when optional filters are absent
